name: Angler AI
description: Send analytics events to Angler AI.

accessToken.label: Authentication Token
accessToken.description: Your Angler AI API Authentication Token

saveOrder.title: Save Order
saveOrder.description: Send an order to Angler. Use this Mapping for transactions which may not originate from the browser. E.g. recurring subscriptions.

line_items.label: Line items
line_items.description: list of line items associated with the order.

id.label: Product Id
id.description: A globally unique identifier for the item.

variantId.label: Variant Id
variantId.description: Identifier for the variant of the product

imageSrc.label: Image Source URL
imageSrc.description: The location of the image as a URL.

priceAmount.label: Price Amount
priceAmount.description: The price of the product variant.

sku.label: SKU
sku.description: The SKU (stock keeping unit) associated with the variant.

type.label: Type
type.description: The product type specified by the merchant.

url.label: URL
url.description: The relative URL of the product.

billing_address.label: Billing Address
billing_address.description: The mailing address associated with the payment method.

address2.label: Address 2
address2.description: An additional field for the customer's mailing address.

city.label: City
city.description: The customer's city, town, or village.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter country code corresponding to the customer's country

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number at this address.

province.label: Province
province.description: The customer's region name. Typically a province, a state, or a prefecture

province_code.label: Province Code
province_code.description: The code for the region of the address, such as the province, state, or district. For example QC for Quebec, Canada.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: The customer's postal code, also known as zip, postcode, Eircode, etc

browser_ip.label: Browser IP
browser_ip.description: The IP address of the browser used by the customer when they placed the order. Both IPv4 and IPv6 are supported.

buyer_accepts_marketing.label: Buyer Accepts Marketing
buyer_accepts_marketing.description: Whether the customer consented to receive email updates from the shop.

client_details.label: Client Details
client_details.description: Information about the browser that the customer used when they placed their order.

user_agent.label: User Agent
user_agent.description: Details of the browsing client, including software and operating versions.

created_at.label: Created At
created_at.description: The autogenerated date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the order was created.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The three-letter code (ISO 4217 format) for the currency that the customer used when they paid for their last order.

current_subtotal_price.label: Current Subtotal Price
current_subtotal_price.description: The current subtotal price of the order in the shop currency. The value of this field reflects order edits, returns, and refunds.

current_total_discounts.label: Current Total Discounts
current_total_discounts.description: The current total discounts on the order in the shop currency. The value of this field reflects order edits, returns, and refunds.

current_total_price.label: Current Total Price
current_total_price.description: The current total price of the order in the shop currency. The value of this field reflects order edits, returns, and refunds.

current_total_tax.label: Current Total Tax
current_total_tax.description: The current total taxes charged on the order in the shop currency. The value of this field reflects order edits, returns, or refunds.

customer_id.label: Customer ID
customer_id.description: A unique identifier for the customer.

discount_applications.label: Discount Applications
discount_applications.description: An ordered list of stacked discount applications. The discount_applications property includes 3 types: discount_code, manual, and script. All 3 types share a common structure and have some type specific attributes.

target_type.label: Target Type
target_type.description: The type of line on the order that the discount is applicable on.

type.label: Type
type.description: The discount application type.

value.label: Value
value.description: The value of the discount application as a decimal. This represents the intention of the discount application.

allocation_method.label: Allocation Method
allocation_method.description: The method by which the discount application value has been allocated to entitled lines.

target_selection.label: Target Selection
target_selection.description: The lines on the order, of the type defined by target_type, that the discount is allocated over.

code.label: Code
code.description: The discount code that was used to apply the discount. Available only for discount code applications.

discount_codes.label: Discount Codes
discount_codes.description: A list of discounts applied to the order.

code.label: Code
code.description: When the associated discount application is of type code, this property returns the discount code that was entered at checkout. Otherwise this property returns the title of the discount that was applied.

amount.label: Amount
amount.description: The amount that's deducted from the order total. When you create an order, this value is the percentage or monetary amount to deduct. After the order is created, this property returns the calculated amount.

type.label: Type
type.description: The type of discount.

estimated_taxes.label: Estimated Taxes
estimated_taxes.description: Whether taxes on the order are estimated. Many factors can change between the time a customer places an order and the time the order is shipped, which could affect the calculation of taxes.

financial_status.label: Financial Status
financial_status.description: The status of payments associated with the order.

fulfillment_status.label: Fulfillment Status
fulfillment_status.description: The order's status in terms of fulfilled line items.

id.label: ID
id.description: The ID of the order, used for API purposes.

landing_site.label: Landing Site
landing_site.description: The URL for the page where the buyer landed when they entered the shop.

order_number.label: Order Number
order_number.description: The order position in the shop count of orders starting at 1001. Order numbers are sequential and start at 1001.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number for receiving SMS notifications.

processed_at.label: Processed At
processed_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when an order was processed.

referring_site.label: Referring Site
referring_site.description: The website where the customer clicked a link to the shop.

shipping_address.label: Shipping Address
shipping_address.description: The mailing address associated with the payment method.

address2.label: Address 2
address2.description: An additional field for the customer's mailing address.

city.label: City
city.description: The customer's city, town, or village.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter country code corresponding to the customer's country

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number at this address.

province.label: Province
province.description: The customer's region name. Typically a province, a state, or a prefecture

province_code.label: Province Code
province_code.description: The code for the region of the address, such as the province, state, or district. For example QC for Quebec, Canada.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: The customer's postal code, also known as zip, postcode, Eircode, etc

source_identifier.label: Source Identifier
source_identifier.description: The ID of the order placed on the originating platform.

source_url.label: Source URL
source_url.description: A valid URL to the original order on the originating surface.

subtotal_price.label: Subtotal Price
subtotal_price.description: The price of the order in the shop currency after discounts but before shipping, duties, taxes, and tips.

tags.label: Tags
tags.description: Tags attached to the order, formatted as a string of comma-separated values. Tags are additional short descriptors, commonly used for filtering and searching. Each individual tag is limited to 40 characters in length.

taxes_included.label: Taxes Included
taxes_included.description: Whether taxes are included in the order subtotal.

total_discounts.label: Total Discounts
total_discounts.description: The total discounts applied to the price of the order in the shop currency.

total_line_items_price.label: Total Line Items Price
total_line_items_price.description: The sum of all line item prices in the shop currency.

total_outstanding.label: Total Outstanding
total_outstanding.description: The total outstanding amount of the order in the shop currency.

total_price.label: Total Price
total_price.description: The sum of all line item prices, discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips in the shop currency. Must be positive.

total_price_usd.label: Total Price USD
total_price_usd.description: The sum of all line item prices, discounts, shipping, taxes, and tips in the shop currency in USD

total_tax.label: Total Tax
total_tax.description: The sum of all the taxes applied to the order in the shop currency. Must be positive.

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: The ID of the user logged into Shopify POS who processed the order, if applicable.

updated_at.label: Updated At
updated_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the order was last modified.

accepts_marketing.label: Accepts Marketing
accepts_marketing.description: Whether the customer has consented to receive marketing material by email.

accepts_marketing_updated_at.label: Accepts Marketing Updated At
accepts_marketing_updated_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the customer consented or objected to receiving marketing material by email.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: The three-letter code (ISO 4217 format) for the currency that the customer used when they paid for their last order.

created_at.label: Created At
created_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the customer was created.

email.label: Email
email.description: The unique email address of the customer.

hashed_email.label: Hashed Email
hashed_email.description: Hashed customer's email in SHA256 (lower case).

hashed_first_name.label: Hashed First Name
hashed_first_name.description: Hashed customer's first name in SHA256 (lower case).

hashed_last_name.label: Hashed Last Name
hashed_last_name.description: Hashed customer's last name in SHA256 (lower case).

hashed_phone.label: Hashed Phone
hashed_phone.description: Hashed customer's phone in SHA256 (lower case).

id.label: ID
id.description: A unique identifier for the customer.

last_order_id.label: Last Order ID
last_order_id.description: The ID of the customer's last order.

last_order_name.label: Last Order Name
last_order_name.description: The name of the customer's last order.

marketing_opt_in_level.label: Marketing Opt In Level
marketing_opt_in_level.description: The marketing subscription opt-in level, as described in the M3AAWG Sender Best Common Practices, that the customer gave when they consented to receive marketing material by email.

orders_count.label: Orders Count
orders_count.description: The number of orders associated with this customer.

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The unique phone number (E.164 format) for this customer.

state.label: State
state.description: The state of the customer's account with a shop.

tax_exempt.label: Tax Exempt
tax_exempt.description: Whether the customer is exempt from paying taxes on their order.

total_spent.label: Total Spent
total_spent.description: The total amount of money that the customer has spent across their order history.

updated_at.label: Updated At
updated_at.description: The date and time (ISO 8601 format) when the customer information was last updated.

verified_email.label: Verified Email
verified_email.description: Whether the customer has verified their email address.

addresses.label: Addresses
addresses.description: A list of the ten most recently updated addresses for the customer.

address2.label: Address 2
address2.description: An additional field for the customer's mailing address.

city.label: City
city.description: The customer's city, town, or village.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter country code corresponding to the customer's country

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number at this address.

province.label: Province
province.description: The customer's region name. Typically a province, a state, or a prefecture

province_code.label: Province Code
province_code.description: The code for the region of the address, such as the province, state, or district. For example QC for Quebec, Canada.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: The customer's postal code, also known as zip, postcode, Eircode, etc

default_address.label: Default Address
default_address.description: The mailing address associated with the payment method.

address2.label: Address 2
address2.description: An additional field for the customer's mailing address.

city.label: City
city.description: The customer's city, town, or village.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter country code corresponding to the customer's country

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number at this address.

province.label: Province
province.description: The customer's region name. Typically a province, a state, or a prefecture

province_code.label: Province Code
province_code.description: The code for the region of the address, such as the province, state, or district. For example QC for Quebec, Canada.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: The customer's postal code, also known as zip, postcode, Eircode, etc

email_marketing_consent.label: Email Marketing Consent
email_marketing_consent.description: The marketing consent information when the customer consented to receiving marketing material by email.

state.label: State
state.description: The current email marketing state for the customer.

opt_in_level.label: Opt In Level
opt_in_level.description: The marketing subscription opt-in level, as described in the M3AAWG Sender Best Common Practices, that the customer gave when they consented to receive marketing material by email.

consent_updated_at.label: Consent Updated At
consent_updated_at.description: The date and time when the customer consented to receive marketing material by email. If no date is provided, then the date and time when the consent information was sent is used.

metafield.label: Metafield
metafield.description: Attaches additional metadata to a shop's resources.

namespace.label: Namespace
namespace.description: A container for a set of metadata. Namespaces help distinguish between metadata that you created and metadata created by another individual with a similar namespace.

value.label: Value
value.description: Information to be stored as metadata.

type.label: Type
type.description: The type.

sms_marketing_consent.label: SMS Marketing Consent
sms_marketing_consent.description: The marketing consent information when the customer consented to receiving marketing material by SMS.

state.label: State
state.description: The state of the SMS marketing consent.

opt_in_level.label: Opt In Level
opt_in_level.description: The marketing subscription opt-in level, as described in the M3AAWG Sender Best Common Practices, that the customer gave when they consented to receive marketing material by SMS.

consent_updated_at.label: Consent Updated At
consent_updated_at.description: The date and time when the customer consented to receive marketing material by SMS. If no date is provided, then the date and time when the consent information was sent is used.

consent_collected_from.label: Consent Collected From
consent_collected_from.description: The source for whether the customer has consented to receive marketing material by SMS.

saveBaseEvent.title: Save Base Event
saveBaseEvent.description: Send a base event that has the basic fields applicable to all events.

ipAddress.label: IP Address
ipAddress.description: The IP address of the user.

userAgent.label: User Agent
userAgent.description: The user agent of the device sending the event.

timestamp.label: Timestamp
timestamp.description: The timestamp when the event was triggered.

fbp.label: Facebook Pixel ID
fbp.description: Facebook Pixel ID. This is a cookie which is unique to each user.

fbc.label: Facebook Click ID
fbc.description: Facebook Click ID. This is a cookie which is unique to each user.

ga.label: Google Analytics ID
ga.description: Google Analytics ID. This is a cookie which is unique to each user.

page.label: Page
page.description: Page details to send with the event

url.label: URL
url.description: The URL where the event occurred.

customAttributes.label: Custom Attributes
customAttributes.description: Custom attributes for the event. Data should be specified as key:value pairs

city.description: The customer's city, town, or village.

country_code.label: Country Code
country_code.description: The two-letter country code corresponding to the customer's country

phone.label: Phone
phone.description: The customer's phone number at this address.

province.label: Province
province.description: The customer's region name. Typically a province, a state, or a prefecture

province_code.label: Province Code
province_code.description: The code for the region of the address, such as the province, state, or district. For example QC for Quebec, Canada.

zip.label: Zip
zip.description: The customer's postal code, also known as zip, postcode, Eircode, etc

id.description: A globally unique identifier for the collection.

collectionProductVariants.description: A list of product variants associated with the collection.
